text.title: Solo MRR Dashboard Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from the dashboard artefact to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for solo-mrr-dashboard-template.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all five canonical metrics computed from one formula each AND is the monthly snapshot frozen?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — one-off purchases need a different dashboard
BLOCK — refunds subtract in month M only
BLOCK — freeze the snapshot on the 5th
BLOCK — pick one definition per metric
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Stripe + $3210 MRR + annual÷12 + refund-subtract + snapshot 2026-05-05 + single formulas + 110 customers (one-paid-sub) → APPROVE → publish.
